start_door.name: door
start_door.description: A heavy door with no handle or lock.
start_door.specialDesc: A heavy door with no handle and no lock stands to the south.

start_terminal.name: terminal
start_terminal.description: I wouldn't be able to see the keyboard, even if it wasn't dark - my head is rigidly pointing straight ahead.

typeResponses.text:
There is a flash, and suddenly the room is illuminated.

Corrugated metal walls. A great mirror covers the wall opposite — and in it you can see yourself, lashed to an enormous wheel of fire. Writing is scrawled across the glass. To the south, a heavy door bears an inscription above its frame.

The wheel shudders and slows. The flames gutter out. The straps fall away and you step free onto the floor.

Behind where the wheel stood, a 4×4 grid of lock boxes is set into the wall. The upper three rows are out of reach from here.
You are no longer bound to the wheel.
You are bound to the wheel. You cannot go anywhere.
There is a heavy clunk. The door swings open.

ixion_wheel.name: wheel
ixion_wheel.description: A great wheel, ten feet across. You are lashed to it.
ixion_wheel.specialDesc: A great wheel of fire dominates the room, spinning slowly. You are lashed to it.

start_mirror.name: mirror
start_mirror.description: A mirror covering the entire wall opposite you. In it you can see yourself, lashed to the wheel.
start_mirror.specialDesc: A great mirror covers the entire wall opposite. In it, you can see yourself lashed to the wheel, and writing scrawled across the glass.

mirror_writing.name: clue
mirror_writing.description: A crossword clue, scrawled in marker across the mirror. [TO BE WRITTEN]

lockbox_grid.name: boxes
lockbox_grid.description: A 4x4 grid of lock boxes set into the wall behind the wheel. Each has a small dial with letters on it. The upper three rows are out of reach from here.

greek_myth_book.name: book of greek myths
greek_myth_book.description: A hefty volume: Greek Myths, A Complete Reference. A ribbon bookmark hangs from the spine.

biblical_ref_book.name: book of biblical references
biblical_ref_book.description: A hefty volume: The Complete Biblical Reference. Well-thumbed.

door_writing.name: inscription
door_writing.description: Writing above the door. [TO BE WRITTEN — clues EXIT TARTARUS]

spotlights.name: spotlights
spotlights.description: Two shafts of light illuminate two lecterns. I can't see where the light comes from, the source is far too bright.

lectern_a.name: left lectern
lectern_a.description: A wooden lectern, lit from above by a spotlight. It has a newspaper article attached to it, which I can just make out from here.
lectern_a.specialDesc: Two lecterns stand to one side, each lit by its own spotlight.

lectern_b.name: right lectern
lectern_b.description: A wooden lectern, lit from above by a spotlight. It has a a block of text written out by what looks like a typewriter. It is titled "Cross Words".

lectern_a_writing.name: article
lectern_a_writing.description: A newspaper article, pasted down onto the left lectern. I can just make out the text.
lectern_a_writing.readDesc: [TO BE WRITTEN — newspaper article about the captor's greatness]

lectern_b_writing.name: document
lectern_b_writing.description: A block of typewritten text on the lectern, titled "Cross Words". I can just about read it from here.
lectern_b_writing.readDesc: [TO BE WRITTEN — the Cross Words document; introduces captor. Clue for FIAT LUX is a deliberate misspelling: "Why don't you lat in the light?"]
